---
title: "Model Evaluation - Diagnostics and VPC"
format: 
  revealjs: 
    embed-resources: true
    css: assets/styles.css
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    margin: 0.05
# execute:
#   enabled: false
---

# Diagnostics - DV vs PRED/IPRED - Base model

![](assets/dv-pred-base.png){fig-align="center"}

# Diagnostics - DV~PRED/IPRED - Base, by eGFR

![](assets/dv-pred-base-egfr.png){fig-align="center"}

# Diagnostics - DV~PRED/IPRED - Final, by eGFR

![](assets/dv-pred-final-egfr.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - Residuals versus TIME

![](assets/cwres-npde-time.png){fig-align="center"}

# Diagnostics - Residuals versus PRED

![](assets/cwres-npde-pred.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - NPDE distrbution

![](assets/npde-hist.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - NPDE non-normal

![](assets/npde-hist-non.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - NPDE covariate

![](assets/npde-covariate.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - NPDE covariate base model

![](assets/npde-covariate-base.png){fig-align="center"}

# Diagnostics - ETA histogram

![](assets/eta-histogram.png){fig-align="center"}



# Diagnostics - ETA covariates

![](assets/eta-covariate-base.png){fig-align="center"}


# Diagnostics - ETA  pairs

![](assets/eta-pairs.png){fig-align="center"}




# Out of the box VPC

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

- Observed data
  - Observed data points
  - Observed median
  - Observed 5th and 95th percentiles

- Simulated data
  - Simulated median
  - Simulated 5th and 95th percentiles

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

![](assets/study-4.png){fig-align="center"}

:::

:::


# VPC showing bins

![](assets/study-4-boxes.png){fig-align="center"}


# VPC dropping observed data points

![](assets/study-4-boxes-noobs.png){fig-align="center"}


# VPC different bins

![](assets/study-4-boxes-bin.png){fig-align="center"}


# Landmark predcheck - histogram

![](assets/pk-pcheck-final-auc-pcheck.png){fig-align="center"}


# Landmark predcheck - QQ

![](assets/pk-pcheck-final-cmin-pcheck.png){fig-align="center"}
